SEARCH

Uses of Package
org.unlaxer.tramli

  • Classes in org.unlaxer.tramli used by org.unlaxer.tramli
    Class
    Description
    BranchProcessor
    Decides which branch to take based on FlowContext state.
    DataFlowGraph
    Bipartite graph of data types and processors/guards derived from a FlowDefinition.
    DataFlowGraph.DiffResult
    Diff two data-flow graphs.
    DataFlowGraph.ExplainResult
    Result of DataFlowGraph.explain(Enum) / DataFlowGraph.explain(Enum, Class).
    DataFlowGraph.Impact
    Impact analysis: all producers and consumers of a given type.
    DataFlowGraph.Lifetime
    Data lifetime: which states a type is first produced and last consumed.
    DataFlowGraph.MissingInfo
    Info about a missing type at a state.
    DataFlowGraph.NodeInfo
    Info about a processor/guard that produces or consumes a type.
    DataFlowGraph.ProducerInfo
    Info about a producer: its name and the state where it produces the type.
    FlowContext
    Accumulator for flow data.
    FlowDefinition
    Immutable flow definition built via DSL.
    FlowDefinition.Builder
     
    FlowDefinition.Builder.BranchBuilder
     
    FlowDefinition.Builder.FromBuilder
     
    FlowDefinition.Builder.SubFlowBuilder
     
    FlowDefinition.BuildResult
    Result of FlowDefinition.Builder.buildAndValidate(): definition (if valid) + structured errors.
    FlowDefinition.ExceptionRoute
    Route to a specific state based on exception type.
    FlowDefinition.ValidationError
    Structured validation error returned by FlowDefinition.Builder.buildAndValidate().
    FlowEngine
    Generic engine that drives all flow state machines.
    FlowErrorType
    Classification of flow errors for retry/recovery strategy.
    FlowException
     
    FlowInstance
    Runtime state of a flow execution.
    FlowState
    Marker interface for all flow state enums.
    FlowStore
    Persistence contract for flow instances.
    InMemoryFlowStore.TransitionRecord
     
    LogEntry.Error
    Emitted when a processor throws or strictMode detects a produces violation.
    LogEntry.GuardResult
    Emitted when a guard validates (accepted, rejected, or expired).
    LogEntry.State
    Emitted when context.put() is called (opt-in via setStateLogger).
    LogEntry.Transition
    Emitted on each state transition.
    Pipeline
    Build-time verified pipeline — sequential step chain with requires/produces contracts.
    Pipeline.PipelineBuilder
     
    PipelineDataFlow
    Lightweight data-flow analysis for Pipelines.
    PipelineStep
    A step in a Pipeline.
    ProcessorContract
    Common contract for anything that processes data in a flow.
    RenderableGraph.DataFlow
    Data-flow graph view: type nodes ↔ processor nodes.
    RenderableGraph.Edge
     
    RenderableGraph.EdgeKind
     
    RenderableGraph.StateDiagram
    State diagram view: state transitions + sub-flows.
    RenderableGraph.StateEdge
     
    RenderableGraph.SubFlowBlock
     
    SkeletonGenerator.Language
     
    StateProcessor
    Processes a state transition. 1 transition = 1 processor (principle).
    Transition
    A single transition in a flow definition.
    TransitionGuard
    Guards an External transition.
    TransitionGuard.GuardOutput
     
    TransitionType
